consignor.motivation: Consignor "Unfors Raysafe AB" from certificate identified in invoice header and packing list issuer after normalization. The Swedish address "Björklundabacken 10, SE-43657 Hovås" matches exactly. No conflicting information found; rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.1 confirmed MATCH.

Vietnam
consignee.invoice_value:
FLUKE SOUTH EAST ASIA PTE LTD
NO 1 CLEMENTI LOOP
#06-02/03/04
129808, SINGAPORE
consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee is "MEASURING AND TESTING EQUIPMENT CO., 447 AU CO ROAD, TAY HO WARD, HANOI, VIET NAM" while invoice's BILL TO ADDRESS is "FLUKE SOUTH EAST ASIA PTE LTD, Singapore"; no matching consignee found in primary invoice consignee fields. No evidence that consignee appears in invoice's primary or secondary recipient fields. According to rule 4.2.0.2, this discrepancy causes MISMATCH.

ART. NO and ART.DESCRIPTION lines matching certificate items:

with serial numbers and product descriptions.
Shipment nr: 297532006, ship date 30-JAN-2026

General note in certificate refers to attached master packlist matching invoice.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate declares goods with general reference to attached invoice and master packlist (shipment nr 297532006, date 30-JAN-2026). Invoice contains matching article numbers and descriptions consistent with certificate's goods description. Rule 4.3.5 applied to accept general goods description with invoice reference; match confirmed.

quantity.motivation: Certificate states quantity as "4,5 GW" (gross weight 4.5 kg), invoice confirms "4.5 GROSS WEIGHT (KG)". Numeric values match after normalization of decimal comma to point and unit abbreviations. No contradictory quantities found, rule 4.4.1 applied to confirm MATCH.

origin.invoice_value: SE, DK, CN (specified in origin columns per item in invoice)
origin.motivation: Certificate origin lists EU countries SE, DK and CN. Invoice origin columns specify SE, DK, and CN as origins for respective goods. EU origin normalization rules applied (4.5.4.1) and match confirmed.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Mismatch detected at consignee verification; other control points match certificate and invoice.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger mottagaren som MEASURING AND TESTING EQUIPMENT CO. i Vietnam, medan fakturan är ställd till FLUKE SOUTH EAST ASIA PTE LTD i Singapore. Detta avvikande namn och adress gör att verifieringen inte kan godkännas automatiskt.
